title: Garlicky Gooey Smoke Raw-Friendly Beef Cutlet Stir-fry
description: This Ukrainian dish features a tender beef cutlet in a garlicky sauce that is lightly smoked for an extra smoky flavor, perfect for raw-friendly meals.
instructions: Prepare the beef cutlets by lightly seasoning them with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, Dijon mustard, water, Worcestershire sauce, and raw milk. Mix well until fully combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Pour in the marinade mixture evenly across the cutlets and let cook for 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown and cooked through.
Drizzle with more olive oil if needed and add minced garlic to the pan, stirring well. Cook for another minute until fragrant but not burnt.
Stir-fry for an additional minute to allow flavors to meld together, ensuring the cutlets are evenly coated in the sauce.
Remove from heat immediately after stirring and sprinkle with fresh parsley before serving.
